query:
SELECT
            scope AS "scope!",
            COUNT(*) AS "thought_count!",
            MIN(created_at) AS "first_activity_at!",
            MAX(created_at) AS "last_activity_at!"
        FROM thoughts
        WHERE retracted_at IS NULL
          AND ($1::text IS NULL OR scope LIKE $1 || '%')
        GROUP BY scope
        ORDER BY MAX(created_at) DESC
